english translation text: AI SHIA YUN IMSHAB, SHAAME GHARIBAANASTO’SHIAS! TONIGHT IS THE NIGHT OF GHAREEBANEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
JISME HUSAYN URYAAN,ANDAR BIYA BAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Oh Shias tonight is the night of Shame Ghariban
The unclothed body of Husayn lies in the desert

urdu transliteration text:
DAR KARBALA IM SHAB ZAARIYO AFGHAANAST,JISME ALI AKBAR,ANDAR BIYA BAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
TONIGHT THERE IS CRYING AND WAILING IN THE LAND OF KERBALA,
THE BODY OF ALI AKBAR IS LYING DESERTED ON THE GROUND

The sacred body of Oh Abaa Abdillah
Trampled by the horses lies on the plains of Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
Ahlul Bayt have been slain, Al-Ghadir ignored again
@HujjatELC
english translation text: On the spears are the heads of the great and pious men

Can you see that young girl with the bleeding ears
Walking in the battlefield, innocent eyes in tears

No Hussein no Akber no Kassim no Abbas
The children are silent, not a whisper of "Al-Atash"

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab his protector, vicious enemies all around
@HujjatELC
english translation text: The Imaam of the time lies unconscious on the ground,

urdu transliteration text:
ZAAKIR DAR UN MAJLIS,SIDDIKAE KUBRAASTAZ DAAGHE, FARZANDASH,BAA QALBE SUZAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE RECITER OF THE MAJLIS IS SIDDEEQAH  E KUBRAA (BIBI FATIMA) HERSELF,
ABLAZE IS HER HEART FOR THE MORTAL WOUND INFLICTED ON HER BELOVED SON

The tents of the families of all those unfaltering
Once looted and plundered are now there blazing

The women without their veils sleeping in the open air
What has happened to the world, is there no one who cares
Oh Shias the memory of tonight will never be lost
